browsermcp: Browser automation using your existing Chrome profile - fast, private, and keeps you logged into sites
chrome-devtools: Official Chrome DevTools MCP server - browser automation, performance tracing, network inspection, screenshots
context7: Real-time library documentation lookup - fetches up-to-date docs and code examples from official sources
grep-app: Code search across public GitHub repositories - find real-world code examples and implementation patterns
next-devtools: Next.js development tools for building and debugging Next.js applications
playwright: Playwright-based browser automation with accessibility snapshots - fast, LLM-friendly browser interaction
webmcp: Connect to websites that expose WebMCP tools - enables AI to use site-specific functionality
websearch: Exa AI-powered web search - real-time web search, code search, and company research
